# Oxford Leaflet Delivery

> Oxford's local leaflet printing and door drop distribution service. We deliver your flyers to homes across Oxford and Oxfordshire — complete start-to-finish service from just £60 per 1,000.

## About

Oxford Leaflet Delivery is a door drop marketing company based in Oxford, UK. We help local businesses, tradespeople, restaurants, estate agents, and organisations reach customers directly in their own homes through targeted leaflet distribution campaigns.

We offer a complete service: print, pack, and distribute — or distribution-only if you supply your own leaflets. Every campaign comes with a completion report delivered to your inbox.

## Services

- **Leaflet distribution** across Oxford and Oxfordshire
- **Print and distribute** — full end-to-end service
- **Distribution only** — we deliver your pre-printed leaflets
- **Targeted campaigns** by postcode, street, or demographic
- Sustainable print production using responsibly sourced materials

## Pricing

- From £60 per 1,000 leaflets distributed
- Minimum order: 5,000 leaflets
- No hidden fees — all-in quote provided before work begins

## Coverage

Oxford city and wider Oxfordshire including: Cowley, Headington, Summertown, Jericho, Botley, Abingdon, Witney, Didcot, Banbury, and surrounding areas.

## How It Works

1. Submit a quote request via the website
2. Our team reviews your brief and responds within one business day
3. We print and prepare your leaflets with quality checks throughout
4. We distribute to your target area and send a completion report

## Contact

- Website: https://oxfordleafletdelivery.co.uk
- Quote form: https://oxfordleafletdelivery.co.uk/#quote
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/letterboxdropsuk/

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- Service area: Oxford, Oxfordshire, UK
- Minimum order: 5,000 leaflets
- Price: £60 per 1,000
- Turnaround: confirmed within 1 business day of enquiry
- Leaflet sizes available: DL, A5, A4
- Print included: yes (optional)
- Tracking: GPS-tracked delivery routes, completion report provided
- Eco credentials: sustainably sourced paper stocks
